# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

This repository hosts a static Hugo site. Security fixes are applied to `main`.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not open public issues for security vulnerabilities.

Instead, report privately using GitHub Security Advisories (if enabled) or contact the maintainers directly through GitHub.

Include:

- A clear description of the issue
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact
- Any suggested remediation

We will acknowledge reports as quickly as possible and coordinate a fix.
